queue_intent: T70 Exploration Danger Gradient & Fundamental Fixes: 21 gates across 3 tiers. Tier 1 fixes broken fundamentals (market volatility, price floors, FO LRU, discoveries, combat juice). Tier 2 builds danger gradient (threat levels, NPC scaling, margin scaling, FO dialogue, lane events, galaxy viz). Tier 3 validates (contract tests, fh_15 audit, epic review).

tasks.title: GATE.T70.ECON.MARGIN_DECAY.001: Fix competence margin decline -60 to -81%
tasks.intent: Reduce MaxDampenBps to prevent price equalization crushing late margins. Add experienced trader decay multiplier so repeated-route dampening recovers faster. Unlock late-game goods after node visit count threshold. Target: late margins >= 80% of early margins.
constraints: Single-session scope: stay within evidence and expected touch paths.
If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.T70.EXPLORE.DISCOVERY_BY_TL.001: Gate discovery placement by threat level
tasks.intent: DiscoverySeedGen uses Node.ThreatLevel to gate placement. TL 0-1: no discoveries. TL 2-3: common anomaly fragments. TL 4+: rare/deep discoveries. Ensures exploration reward scales with danger.
constraints: Single-session scope: stay within evidence and expected touch paths.
If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.

Implement LRU selection: track last-used index per pool, never repeat within window of pool.Length/3. 163-line Analyst pool is large enough -- problem is selection algorithm.
